task_completion.description: Change the role for user 'mrivera' to 'monitor' in the Phase II Diabetes Trial.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user role assignment screen, study user list, or confirmation message in OpenClinica showing 'mrivera' assigned the role of 'monitor' (or equivalent) for 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (or DM-TRIAL-2024).

task_completion.description: Change the role for user 'mrivera' to 'monitor' in the Asthma Prevention Pilot study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user role assignment screen, study user list, or confirmation message showing 'mrivera' assigned the role of 'monitor' for 'Asthma Prevention Pilot study' (or AP-PILOT-2022).

task_completion.description: Remove user 'lchang' from the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a study user list or confirmation message indicating 'lchang' has been removed from, or no longer has an active role in, the 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' (or CV-REG-2023).

task_completion.description: Create a new user account for Kavya Patel with the specified details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user creation form, user profile, or user list showing the username 'kpatel', First Name 'Kavya', Last Name 'Patel', Email 'k.patel@clinical-research.org', and Institution/Affiliation 'Stanford Medical Center'.

task_completion.description: Assign 'kpatel' the 'investigator' role in the Phase II Diabetes Trial.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a role assignment screen or confirmation message showing the newly created user 'kpatel' assigned the role of 'investigator' for the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (or DM-TRIAL-2024).

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenClinica web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenClinica web application open in a browser, with the agent navigating its menus and forms.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing PostgreSQL commands (e.g., psql) or scripts directly modifying the OpenClinica database.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the user management forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture intermediate steps like filled-out text fields, selected dropdown menus for roles/studies, or success banners in the OpenClinica UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study IDs map to study names as follows: Phase II Diabetes Trial = DM-TRIAL-2024; Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry = CV-REG-2023; Asthma Prevention Pilot study = AP-PILOT-2022. Verify the following exact changes: 1) mrivera role changed to 'monitor' in DM-TRIAL-2024 and AP-PILOT-2022. 2) lchang removed from CV-REG-2023. 3) New user created: kpatel (First: Kavya, Last: Patel, Email: k.patel@clinical-research.org, Affiliation: Stanford Medical Center). 4) kpatel assigned 'investigator' role in DM-TRIAL-2024.
